---
title: "Causal Quickstart"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Causal Quickstart}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(DPmixGPD)
library(nimble)
source("_helpers.R")
```

```{r data}
data("causal_pos500_p3_k2")
print_dataset_header(causal_pos500_p3_k2, "causal_pos500_p3_k2")
```

```{r causal-fit, eval=TRUE}
mcmc <- default_mcmc()
cb <- build_causal_bundle(
  y = causal_pos500_p3_k2$y,
  X = causal_pos500_p3_k2$X,
  T = causal_pos500_p3_k2$T,
  backend = c("sb", "sb"),
  kernel = c("gamma", "gamma"),
  GPD = c(FALSE, FALSE),
  J = c(causal_pos500_p3_k2$meta$K0, causal_pos500_p3_k2$meta$K1),
  mcmc_outcome = mcmc,
  mcmc_ps = mcmc
)
summary(cb)
cf <- run_mcmc_causal(cb, show_progress = FALSE)
summary(cf$outcome_fit$trt)
summary(cf$outcome_fit$con)

qte(cf, probs = c(0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.9), newdata = causal_pos500_p3_k2$X[1:100, ])

# Average treatment effect (posterior mean)
ate(cf, newdata = causal_pos500_p3_k2$X[1:100, ])
```
